title: arabis media var. intermedia
intro: Arabis media var. intermedia, also known as Rock Cress or Alpine Cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Arabis media var. intermedia include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
